evals.name: lookup-case-mismatch
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis names case-sensitivity. Trace shows 'eng' doesn't match 'ENG'. Fix wraps input in upper or lower transform.

evals.name: replace-as-filter-bug
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis identifies replace-as-filter producing '' which firstValid treats as valid. Fix uses conditional with negativeCondition: null instead.

evals.name: datecompare-no-ignoreerrors
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis: missing ignoreErrors:true on firstValid. dateCompare throws on null, kills refresh. Fix adds ignoreErrors:true.

evals.name: wrong-source-name
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis: sourceName outdated. Fix updates to 'Corp AD'. Mentions sourceId would be more stable.

evals.name: substring-off-by-one
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis: end is exclusive in substring (chars 0,1,2,3 = 4 chars). Fix sets end=3.
